---
title: "Microsoft Hires Python's Creator"
description: "Yes please!"
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-06-03"
categories: [Microsoft, computer science, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Microsoft + Python. Image from [GitHub](https://github.com/faster-cpython/ideas/blob/main/FasterCPythonDark.pdf).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Yes please!

<https://github.com/faster-cpython/ideas/blob/main/FasterCPythonDark.pdf>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_microsoft-python-activity-6806376152152842240-Yuq7).*
